title: Unique Party 59080 Warner Bros Happy Birthday Letter Banner | Harry Potter | 1 Pc, multi-coloured
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES: 1 Harry Potter "Happy Birthday" letter banner - 5' long.
MAGICAL DESIGN: Complete your Harry Potter birthday decoration with this magical letter banner.
PERFECT FOR ALL OCCASIONS: Perfect to complete your themed birthday, halloween, Christmas party, school fair, and more.
HIGH QUALITY: Made of high quality and thick paper which you can use over and over again.

Caution: This item is not a toy. Not suitable for use by children. For decorative use only. To avoid danger of suffocation, keep this plastic bag away from babies and children. Do not use this bag in cribs, beds, carriages or playpens
description: From the manufacturer Harry Potter Birthday Add-On Items These add-on items are the perfect addition to your Raindow Dots Birthday Party.
